tags.name: Young Wo Memorial Site
tags.description: The Young Wo Memorial is a burial ground primarily for people from the Chung Shan District of China. The Chinese pioneers who struggled for economic survival and human dignity helped build Folsom and the West and are buried here at this memorial.
